channel.title: Our Books on Urmila Publication House
channel.description: Recent content in Our Books on Urmila Publication House

item.title: Commentary on the Companies Act & NCLT Practice
item.description:
A comprehensive guide covering the Companies Act 2013, NCLT/NCLAT procedures, landmark judgments, and practical insights for professionals and students.

  1. Introduction to Companies Act
  2. Incorporation & Matters
  3. NCLT & NCLAT Practice …
